title: EAE spec refinement — CORE INGESTION first; rubrics/events parked with guards
scope: EAE full product vs CORE INGESTION milestone
reason: Keep specification-vs-implementation distinction. Refine mesh topology (role-aware) and CAD accuracy (guards). Park stronger append-only event model. Do not build full seven-stage EAE before CORE INGESTION.
decision: Accepted state: EAE specification ACCEPTED; full executable ABSENT; CORE INGESTION PARTIAL_FIXTURE_VALIDATED; scoring NOT_EXECUTED; rubrics DRAFT; event model OPTIONAL_PROPOSAL; rc1 UNCHANGED; door slice BLOCKED_BY_MISSING_ASSET.
Next milestone is EAE CORE INGESTION only (local fixture→quarantine→detect→hash→extract→manifest→idempotency).
Mesh rubric must classify geometry_role; watertight not always required.
CAD relative-error formula requires abs(nominal)>0, clamp>=0, and comparability prerequisites.
Event model gains sequence/schema/actor/hash algorithm/canonicalization/supersession; remains parked.
